name: Operational Magic

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Magic Circle — the consecrated perimeter that separates the ritual space from the mundane world.

VINIT.justification: The raw, uninitialized state of the room before the ritual intent is projected.

TANCH.justification: The terminal anchor that contains the entire operation and prevents leakage.

AFWD.justification: The forward morphism that calls a specific force or entity from the source to the circle.

AREV.justification: The reverse morphism that returns the invoked force to its origin, clearing the space.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of gestures, words, and tools into a single coherent operation.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity id; the operator recognizes themselves as the source and authority of the work.

FSPLIT.justification: Splitting the abstract intent into a visual geometric character and a vocalized name.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstituting the intent by vibrating the name while focusing on the sigil, closing the loop.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the ritual result is achieved and recognized.

EVALF.justification: The negative state where the ritual fails or produces an unintended, dissonant effect.

ENGAGR.justification: A paradice where the magician is simultaneously in the physical world and the spirit realm.

IFIX.justification: The irreversible fixation of the ritual's success and method into a permanent record.

phase_3.void_description: The silence before the first word is spoken; the unlit candle.
phase_3.true_description: The spirit is present; the sigil glows; the intent is realized.
phase_3.false_description: The spirit is absent; the circle is broken; the energy is dissipated.
phase_3.both_description: The 'Crossing of the Abyss'; the magician holds both their mortal and divine identities without collapse.

steps.domain_action: The magician stands in the center of the uninitialized room.
The magician recognizes their own authority (I AM).
The magician traces the Magic Circle, establishing the system boundary.
The magician invokes the four elemental watchtowers to orient the space.
The magician takes the abstract intent and splits it into a drawn sigil and a secret name.
The magician chains the lighting of incense to the vibration of the name.
The magician enters a trance, existing in both the physical and astral planes simultaneously.
The magician focuses the trance energy onto the sigil while speaking the name, fusing intent into form.
The sigil is anointed with oil, permanently fixing the charge into the physical substrate.
The magician perceives the manifestation of the desired change in the environment.
The magician performs the Lesser Banishing Ritual to release the forces.
The magician closes the circle and extinguishes the candles.
The magician records the entire operation in their Book of Shadows.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Ritual Script (The Liturgy), which translates the magician's will into specific actions.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The Correspondences (Colors, Herbs, Stones), which communicate intent across different scales of reality.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Grimoire, storing the structural addresses and names of the entities.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Astrological Timing (Electional Magic), determining when specific gates are open.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Tradition (e.g., Hermeticism, Solomonic), providing the bootstrap store of symbols and logic.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Psychic Energy / Vitality of the Operator.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: A state of potentiality and unaligned mundane variables.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: A state of realized intent and re-aligned local reality.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The ritual reorders local information without creating new energy, satisfying the Frobenius loop.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → TANCH → AFWD → FSPLIT → CLINK → ENGAGR → FFUSE → IFIX → EVALT → AREV → CLINK → IFIX
-- Class: Operational Magic
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,2,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=False | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 7)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑡  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑠 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [6] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [7] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [8] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → ⊙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [9] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑭 → 𐑗  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [10] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               ⊙ → 𐑱  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [11] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑗 → 𐑭  | composition — regime coherence
--   [12] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑱 → 𐑼  | irreversible fixation — winding number

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def operational_magic_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The magician stands in the center of the uninitialized room.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The magician recognizes their own authority (I AM).)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑠 𐑾)  -- [2] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The magician traces the Magic Circle, establishing the system boundary.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑚)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The magician invokes the four elemental watchtowers to orient the space.)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (The magician takes the abstract intent and splits it into a drawn sigil and a secret name.) / FFUSE [7] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The magician chains the lighting of incense to the vibration of the name.)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The magician enters a trance, existing in both the physical and astral planes...)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [7]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [7] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The magician focuses the trance energy onto the sigil while speaking the name, fusing intent into form.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 ⊙)  -- [8] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The sigil is anointed with oil, permanently fixing the charge into the physic...)
  (.arrow ⊙ 𐑭 𐑗)  -- [9] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The magician perceives the manifestation of the desired change in the environ...)
  (.arrow 𐑗 ⊙ 𐑱)  -- [10] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The magician performs the Lesser Banishing Ritual to release the forces.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑗 𐑭)  -- [11] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The magician closes the circle and extinguishes the candles.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑱 𐑼)  -- [12] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The magician records the entire operation in their Book of Shadows.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def operational_magic_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (operational_magic_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem operational_magic_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
